# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind Improves Sign-In with Google Authentication and AI Assistance
- Summary: Introducing Google authentication integration to streamline sign-in and profile sync, complemented by the updated AI assistant capabilities for faster problem-solving within CodeGrind.
- Slug: codegrind-new-ai-assisted-signin-flow
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-new-ai-assisted-signin-flow
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-03-codegrind-new-ai-assisted-signin-flow.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now offers a smoother onboarding with Google Sign-In, automatic profile synchronization, and enhanced Azure OpenAI-backed guidance, improving both security and user experience without changing core challenges.
- CTA: Sign in with Google to bootstrap your CodeGrind profile and start solving problems with enhanced AI assistance.
- Visual brief: A clean UI mockup showing Google Sign-In button beside CodeGrind logo, with subtle cyberpunk UI elements in the background. Include a small AI chat panel and a profile avatar syncing indicator to convey authentication and AI features.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
